special_mechanics.name: Variable Jump Height by Character
special_mechanics.description: Different family members have different jump heights. Lyll can jump higher than other family members. Xemn (father) cannot jump as high as the rest of the family.

special_mechanics.name: Magic-Based Movement Items
special_mechanics.description: Magical items enable environmental movement effects including flight (magical wings), block manipulation (magical gloves for moving special blocks), and key-based access (magical key). Only specific characters can use certain items.

special_mechanics.name: Character-Specific Abilities
special_mechanics.description: Each character has unique movement capabilities. Pochi (pet) cannot jump very high and has limited item compatibility.

tier_notes: Tier 2 (empirical/qualitative). Sources document relative character abilities and special mechanics but do not provide quantitative physics values. No precise movement speed, acceleration, gravity, or sub-pixel system data is documented in available sources.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Legacy of the Wizard
